2026-04-09ESDCAccessible Canada ActAppointment of a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development OrganizationAppointment of Brendon Devi Pooran of Thornhill, Ontario, to be a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization
precis: Appointment of Brendon Devi Pooran of Thornhill, Ontario, to be a director of the Canadian Accessibility Standards Development Organization, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
